subcodes.first_line: O spiritual youth! Render thanks unto God that thou art even as a graceful cypress beside the stream of guidance, and in the rose-garden of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان روحانی حمد کن خدا را که در جویبار هدایت سرو روانی و در گلشن موهبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
